pool.baseline:
Hey, I'm looking at the audit from the Rotterdam DC for the Q3 electronic component stock. We've got some weird discrepancies between our WMS and the physical count. Can you look at this table and tell me if you see any patterns or possible reasons for the shrinkage?

| SKU | Description | WMS Count | Physical Count | Variance |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| XJ-992 | Micro-Cap 10uF | 1,450 | 1,442 | -8 |
| BX-104 | Resistor Array | 5,200 | 5,195 | -5 |
| LT-005 | Logic Gate IC | 890 | 882 | -8 |
| PM-441 | Voltage Regulator | 310 | 308 | -2 |
| ZK-221 | Sensor Module | 125 | 120 | -5 |

The variances are small but they happen every month.
